calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VILLA JACINTO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED. Motion creates a credibility problem regarding the alleged (per January 6, 2015 Proof of Service) December 31, 2014 personal service of the Statement of Damages. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Off Calendar

Motion Of Plaintiff Eilyn Dataylo And Aurora Sugarol For Default Judgment Against Defendant Villa M Jacinto
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Paul Behrend, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, EILYN DATAYLO and AURORA SUGAROL.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VILLA M. JACINTO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiffs Eilyn Dataylo and Aurora Sugarol sworn and examinded their own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $424,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $20,000.00
Costs: $75.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $444,575.00
Judgment signed in open court.
